meaning: n.[医]缝合,缝合处,缝合用的线vt.缝合
examples: It has many surgery approaches, such as laparoscopic sacral suture and hysteropexy.
Objective To discuss a good method of suture on flexor tendon .
Duct tape is widely used for first aid as a sort of temporary suture.
He's injured and here they won't attend to him simply because they don't have anything to suture him with.
